description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: For your headquarters electricity account, find all unpaid invoices, choose the one with the lowest total amount, and pay it in full using your saved Visa credit card.
tasks.name: For your headquarters electricity account, find all unpaid invoices, choose the one with the lowest total amount, and pay it in full using your saved Visa credit card.

tasks.instruction: For your downtown retail location’s electricity account, view all fixed‑rate plans with contract terms of at least 12 months, sort by lowest estimated monthly cost, and switch to the cheapest option starting on the first day of next month.

target_names: 12‑month fixed‑rate electricity plan with the lowest estimated monthly cost

tasks.instruction: For your warehouse location’s gas account, create a usage alert that triggers when daily gas consumption exceeds 250 units and sends notifications by both email and SMS every day of the week.

tasks.instruction: Add a new branch location on East Market Street with the specified US mailing address, and link it to the existing electricity account whose number ends in 4578 so that account appears under the new location.

target_names: Electricity account with number ending in 4578

tasks.instruction: For your downtown retail location’s gas account, generate and download a monthly summary usage report covering January through June 2025 in CSV format.

tasks.instruction: Update the company‑wide billing contact so that all current utility accounts use the email billing@examplecorp.com and phone number 555‑0199.

tasks.instruction: Create an autopayment rule that pays electricity invoices of 200 dollars or less three days before their due date using the saved bank account from First National Bank.

target_names: Electricity invoices ≤$200, 3 days before due date rule

tasks.instruction: In the cost analytics for Q2 2025, find the location with the highest total electricity cost, open that location’s account, and add a note saying “Review contract – highest Q2 2025 electricity cost”.
